nasb.text: So they went up to the city. As they came into the city, behold, Samuel was coming out toward them to go up to the high place.

esv.text: So they went up to the city. As they were entering the city, they saw Samuel coming out toward them on his way up to the high place.

cnv.text: 於是二人上那城去；他們正進城的時候，撒母耳就迎著他們出來，要上邱壇去。

ccb.text: 他们就赶往城内，刚走进城，就看见撒母耳迎面而来，要上丘坛去。
